title: 宝塚記念の後に・熱を受けて！

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: It felt like a dream.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hyaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(Wow! Wow, wow, wow, wow, WOW! This is
incredible!)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(I can feel everyone's passion—their light. Their
dreams! I can actually feel all of it!)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: RRRRAAAAAUUGH!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: (I wish this moment could last forever!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Woooow! This was the best Takarazuka Kinen I've
ever seen! Talk about a dream grand prix!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
No kidding! Everyone really wore their dreams on
their sleeves out there!

text_block_list.name: Spectator C
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait for the Arima Kinen in December! I
bet it's gonna be a million times more exhilarating
with Oguri there to crank up the heat!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: That was a truly spectacular race, everyone.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
One day... I'll definitely be out there with all of
you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'll put my very life and dream on the line to make
it happen!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I'm so glad I was able to run today.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(The race may be over... but I can still feel the
scorching heat of everyone's dreams.)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(But I know I can make that heat burn even hotter
and brighter!)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Bamboo.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Yaeno! Thanks for the incredible race!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe.
You never change, do you?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Your next race is the Sprinters Stakes, correct?
And following that...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: That's right! After that...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'll be racing against Oguri! I'm going to face
down my destiny!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Then, it appears it's my turn to help usher you
toward your dream.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Show me what you've got, Bamboo. Stand atop
the summit of the sprints, and use that inferno
inside you to incinerate the Beast down to her
very fangs.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Yaeno!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Don't forget me! I'll be rooting for you to achieve
your dream too!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
And once you have, we should all run together
again!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure Ardan is thinking the same thing up in the
stands right now!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: For sure!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
We'll all bring our dreams together in a race again
one day! Count on it!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Don't they all look fired up?! Can't say I
don't feel the same, though! That was one helluva
race!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'm lookin' forward to the next chance I have to
race all of 'em!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
That's just the kind of person Bamboo is. Always
inspiring people.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Ugh, I know I said this was the big race for me, but I already want to run again.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I've never run as hard as I did in this race, but it's
like she lit something inside of me... I feel like I
can push myself even harder next time.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...I hope you're prepared to deal with the consequences,
Bamboo.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I head out to meet her, Bamboo Memory
looks completely at ease, despite just having run
as hard as she could.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Thank you SO MUCH for letting me enter the
Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I realized something today! All my
rivals—everyone in this whole generation...
They're all the absolute best!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: That's why I wanna become this generation's ultimate runner! No, I don't just want to be—I will be!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna become Oguri's top rival!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
And to do that, I'm gonna win the Sprinters
Stakes! Count on it!
choice_data_list: Then let's go claim your place at the top!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: You said it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Driven by the fervor of her generation, Bamboo
Memory takes her final steps toward her dream!
